metadata.album: Music For The Masses | The 12" Singles
metadata.lyrics:
[01:46.10] There'll be times when my crimes
[01:50.32] Will seem almost unforgivable

[01:58.16] Because you have to make this life liveable

[03:09.68] I'm not trying to say I'll have it all my way
